changelog: Feature: Dashboard — Successful Backups tile showing 7-day job count
Feature: Dashboard — Failed Backups tile now shows job-level count (last 7 days)
Feature: Dashboard — Backup Jobs (7d) summary card replaces bar chart with plain numbers
Fix: Dashboard stats load on initial render (no more — placeholder)
Feature: Activities page complete redesign — unified job list with filters, customer column, inline log expansion
Fix: Report Bug button opens GitHub Issues directly instead of custom modal
